title: MinDix Radiation
description: plugin that adds radiation to the server 1.20+
body:
The plugin adds radiation to the server and harms players, the mycelium will always cause harm, you can also select the radius of radiation and turn off the wings, you can give rights to the player so that damage is not caused

Permission and Command

permission: radiation_damage 
------------------------------
command: 

/rmd reload - reload plugin 
/rmd radiation create - create radiation 
/rmd radiation enable true/false on/off radiation 
/rmd radiation radius - radius radiation 

paper 1.20+
